column1: 8 PM DEBBY | Winds are up to 70 mph. Category 1 winds begin at 74 mph. Our area continues to see flash flooding and scattered tornado warnings. The 11 pm track may shift east for landfall as the center is closer to the coast than the 5 pm forecast track. We'll let you know as soon as that comes in.
Saved our tortoise from the flood. lol
aww this is the cutest 🥰
love your sulcata! This is my sister's!
Love it !😍
the cats are happy lol
They are trying to figure out why that “cat” is so strange looking. lol
you do know they can swim underwater right?
it's a tortoise not a turtle
Ummmm. No, they cannot. lol. It’s a tortoise. They don’t swim.

so close. Not a gopher tortoise. Keeping a gopher would be a 3rd degree felony. He is an African spurred tortoise otherwise known as a sulcata. Yes, a land dweller who loves to dig. He has the most beautiful dinosaur feet that helps him dig not swim.
ahhh ok he looks like a gopher in the photo. I thought you rescued him from the yard . I didn’t realize he was a pet. Yes I know gophers are protected .
Raining enough in Wesley Chapel that the walking catfish are out for a stroll
I’m in Wesley chapel!
more rain for us this afternoon, unfortunately 😑
I saw! See anymore catfish?!
omg I saw one in Orlando the other night
they're creepy looking!
same here in Pinellas park
My electricity was off about an hour. One of my daughters called Duke and told them , that I am on oxygen and they said by 10:30. They already have done it. I ask for prayer and yes. 💜💜
where are you located
Ankle deep water in Trinity Presbyterian church and adjoining school in Clearwater. My kids are there now trying to save as much of their classroom furniture as possible. 😑
oh this is awful
oh wow! Roof leak?
i think it came in under the doors. They are getting bags of soil to use as sandbags.
they have a garden in the middle with buildings surrounding so it made a pool basically and started pushing its way out
I feel like this storm has been worse then even the cat 2s we’ve had here in largo.

yes substantially more than an afternoon thunderstorm. The gusts here near the coast are powerful, and the rain is no joke either. Feels more like a main event than the "dress rehearsal" everyone thought it would be.
is largo near Clearwater? I’m trying to get an idea of how bad it is for where my daughter lives. I can’t get in touch with her
depends where in Clearwater were close to Seminole. A ton of ppl do not have electric
totally agree! These gusts are STRONG!
agreed. We’ve been without power for hours. This has never happened before since I moved here 11 years ago.
a lot of people are saying this. I’ve never seen this much wind and rain in Brandon
This is in a park in Largo
Ranchero Village. Thank you.
agree
Stopped raining long enough for dog potty break. It's back at it SoG
yea, I'm waiting for it to stop enough to take my dog out for the night!
yes!
nobody cares
Gotta make the best of it 😭😂 yall stay safe
where are you at? Stay safe.
pinellas park.

I don’t understand for those of you that are stuck outside or in locations that are preventable if you’re not at work or you don’t need to be out I’m not understanding why you’re out in the storm. What could you possibly need from Publix Winn-Dixie, Walmart that couldn’t wait until the storm pass or that you could have gotten prior to the weather getting bad now you want people to feel sorry for you?? 🙄
someone had to say it, I never understood these people.
I wonder if they had to work.

me either and i
Don’t say it with Ill intent i just don’t
Understand it….its like the girl
That cried wolf…. What’s are
You missing ? It’s too Much bad stuff that could happen in bad weather….but I’m just gonna sit home until it’s over.
that’s understandable,,.. but that comment is only for those that are not working.
first responders are not included.
people like me get bored sitting around so we go out

we all get bored right but I’m saying that to be out in a storm where you can’t do anything it’s not going to solve the fact that I’m bored there are multiple things that you can do at home if you’re bored when it’s storming such as watch the Olympics that are on or clean the garage that you’ve been putting to the side for weeks and months on end or simply relaxing and enjoying the rain and just being safe.
totally fine but leave your phone behind so you are not tempted to call if problems arise.

I don’t have a garage.i went out earlier this afternoon to get some stuff to work on at home tomorrow.im not driving all around but I hate when people tell me I have to do something.sounds like the current government.obey all you sheep

I’m having trouble understanding the whole landfall thing. It’s been on land all day. The entire state is practically covered by this storm. How is it that “landfall” hasn’t occurred? Can anyone explain this to me?
Thanks everyone! That makes sense and appreciate “most” of you simply answering my question without being jerks!
the center of the storm also known as the eye for a hurricane must make landfall
it’s when the eye of the storm makes landfall.
the eye of the storm hasn’t made landfall yet
Also, the winds are stronger right outside the eye of the storm. That's why nobody wants to be the place where the eye makes landfall.
that’s logical. Not where I’d want to be either!! Stay safe!
Thanks, stay safe, too!
now do you understand it? 😂😂😂😂. Stay safe
I do. I couldn’t see a clearly defined eye in the radar so I was confused. You stay safe as well

thank you for explaining that! It makes so much more sense now!
Weak or not, stay safe!
Stay safe everyone. We’re in Fort Myers and the weather was definitely more strong than we expected. So much rain, heavy wind, lots of flooding, and lots of tornadic circulation.
Yikes!
it was dicey here for about 36 hours. Last band was really stromg. Picture of my porch....

me too Ft Myers
This is crazy all the way from Naples all the way up. This is going to be just great for insurances already so high.
Freaking because wind pounding rain and howling trees. Not funny.
where?
Sarasota county
ok. Thank you
yes me too...where is Dennis? Make Debby stop!
My horses paddock. Luckily they are dry and snug in the barn
No one is talking about this northeast turn.
yep I saw it moving east long time ago. What the heck!
started jogging east more than north a few hours ago. They don’t want to talk about it because it makes their forecasts look bad.
my thoughts exactly

I feel like I’m underprepared for this one. Denis has been saying it would be like a usual afternoon thunderstorm but it’s much more than that. I’ve never had water come in my house from rain and it’s coming in right now through the sliding doors. I feel like sand bags would have helped with that but I didn’t get any because it was so hyped down by the meteorology team.
In the middle of pasco county
where are you located?

yes!exactly!
They missed the mark on this one ..
Always prepare, you never know, trust no one. It's a typical west coast storm. Eastside of storm always produces rain and flooding.

No! Go away from Tampa Bay! 💨
I just backwashed my pool for the third time today. Then I pushed all the rain that built up on my pool deck and into the lanai into the pool. I’ve lived thru a lot of hurricanes but don’t ever recall this much rainfall in such a short period of time.
Stay safe!
agree! I had to empty water out of the pool 4 times! The rain was bananas! In all the storms before, I’ve never had to empty the pool that much!
Watching that eastward wobble
Still looks like it's going Northeast.
looks like it wobbled east. And heading North again. Mike (from the other weather page) said Perry might be the new landfall.
where was the initial landfall supposed to be?

closer to tally. It took a wobble East, but that doesn’t mean it’s starting its NNE turn. Just it wobbled East. Is heading north. Draw a line north, leads to Perry. A cedar key landfall would be drastic. Stronger storms don’t just turn NE that fast.
gotcha. It's kind of odd because I'm hearing a bit of thunder which isn't overly common for tropical storms. Have a safe night

you’ll get some thunder as the bands roll in. Storms like these are gunna wobble. It wobbled east. And then west again. Either way, it’s still heading North. So sure, track may update at 11pm. But not cedar key drastic. Tally to Perry shift seems reasonable. Stay safe as well
cedar key and levy county are now under a hurricane watch.
don't think it's a wobble as of this moment a hour later still heading east

Denis Phillips Thank you so much. As I was putting my son to bed in Lakewood Ranch, where the 7:45 tornado warning was, I got him to sleep and turned on the TV and there you and Nadine were. So incredibly grateful for you. 🤍💚
Have family in Bradenton/Lakewood Ranch. Anything?
We're ok.

I am in Sanford at my daughter’s house with my other daughter visiting from CA.
My husband went back to Dunedin this morning as worried as we live on Curlew Creek. We were devastated by flooding from Idalia. Now the city has put new valves in our drains and it seems to be working for us, only had rain water on the road and not salt water creeping through the drains. Hoping this will save us from any surge. We always got flooded on a dry day when there was a high tide. Just a little information.
Watching you now. 💝
how are things in Sanford? My grandkids are supposed to fly in tomorrow. 🙏We’re driving over from Clearwater.

Believe there is going to be a lot of rain but nothing to stop flights. The runway is at the bottom of our road on Ohio Avenue and we are fine here. I have been gardening most of the day. Think it will get much better in the afternoon. No rain or wind at all now.
thank you!

We are in a low occuring flood zone. Tyrone area. Small lake behind us. Has not flooded like this as long as we‘ve lived here, 10 years, until today. The water is also flooding streets in the neighborhood, including the local park, which is completely under water. This is quite unusual.
it’s due to us having so much rain already we flooded easily we weren’t in a drought as we usually are.
our street was flooding up into our yards. Intersections are still under water. I've never seen it this bad.
This is worse than the hurricane a couple years ago, imo.
I said the same thing
yes suddenly very strong
agreed
where are you located?

Guess we won’t get hardly anything here in Tallahassee if it bumps east. Seems we always dodge stuff and get lucky with no direct landfalls here. They seem to go just east or west of us in recent years. Skin of teeth lucky Tallahassee.
definitely matters which side of hurricane you get hit with. Onshore v. offshore winds make all the difference.

yeah, I know. Lived in fl my whole life. Our local joke is fsu mag lab helps tally from getting the worst direct hit of hurricane storms but it’s just a matter of time before our luck runs out in current years and we get a Wakulla/Leon landfall. Going to happen at some point. Poor Taylor county looks they will get it again this storm and we know people that haven’t recovered from the cat3 there last year.
you want a hurricane there?

not exactly, just you get worked up and prepared. I feel bad for Taylor county as they took the brunt last year too. It’s just tally is on edge of maps. If it goes more east than tally won’t get nearly as much impact and that’s not a bad thing for those that live here.

We’re brits staying at a hotel complex in Kissimmee. Just seen there is a tornado watch in place.
We don’t know what to do if the worst happens. Just wait inside I guess and hope for the best? We’re on a big resort. 😣🙈
Stay in an interior room with no windows like a bathroom

don’t stress-this isn’t a bad storm.. probably flooded streets from the rain and if you get a tornado warning stay inside away from windows.. most of the media will play this up with as much drama as they can.. Denis Phillips is the one to follow ..
you'll be fine, this isnt a big storm, just lots of wind and rain. Stay inside and wait until it passes. (Fellow Brit living in Florida 🤗)
Thank you. Getting I little anxious. 🙈
Wow if Ian was your first then you are seasoned for life. That was epic horrifying.

ptsd from that one! We boarded up and evacuated Tampa. Drove through the Everglades on tornado warning with the safety sirens blaring through the car speakers. Ive literally never been so terrified in my life. Thought we were going to end up in the swamps, eaten by gators 🥹
that ride is scary on a good night. I can totally imagine what you dealt with. Awful
stay inside.
Will roads be dangerous to travel on tomorrow from pinellas to park to Tampa in the am?
probably
No more storms named Debby!
This is worse than Idalia 😔😔
for us too
I’d be worried in the panhandle after what we’ve seen here
we're on the west is best side.
panhandle will be fine….the Big Bend area is going to take the hit.
Remember last year when we missed all the rain?
yesssss
I am grateful you have taken over tv I want to know what’s going on, don’t care about local show!♥️
We have been getting SLAMMED here in Largo for hours. Wind is the worst it's been right now
Thanks for staying with those tornado warnings!! I’m in Lakewood Ranch and it was so helpful to have you on air!
…so the danger there has passed?
…Yes, I think so! But I was pretty concerned (scared) for bit! 😬
When is this going to end for the Bay area?

Thank You Denis for holding your own on ch . 11 !!! ♥️ … keep up the great work
😉

This storm seemed worse than the last few hurricanes we’ve had. The amount of rain, debris /downed limbs and trees and power outages. Fortunately I only lost power for an hour.. but other people seem to be going through it.
What about us in Hernando!!! We still have warnings!!!
I know! I just said this last night.
right ?!! They never say anything about Hernando . Maybe 30 secs
we are getting pounded here in weeki Wachee ugh 😩

Wind just got worse here in Cortez and back to some crazy downpours . It already broke some of our windows here.8m sorry but this feels a lot worse than a trip storm. It's been at it for 13 hrs straight here. No breaks at all
Did I just see an update with a turn east? It looks like more than a wobble!
he mentioned that in his caption above. The 11pm update should reflect that track
that’s a big turn. I’m wondering if it’ll turn sooner/make landfall than thought.
what would that mean or do in this case?
remember Ian was going to hit Tampa and made a right turn into Fort Myers Beach 😞
that's what I'm wondering too

Stay safe. I know all about last Christmas in Australia. My house in Wonga Beach Nth Queensland got absolutely smashed by floods. I had water nearly 8ft high inside my house.Thats after a record of 29 inches of rain in just an 20 hour period. I ost every I had. My thoughts go out to the Floridians that doing it tough.
How long till the worst bands pass Sarasota?
that’s what I want to know too how much longer
I know, don’t know how much more water we can take.
We have 'street rivers' in Largo, Ulmerton and Belcher
Out here on the beach we can totally tell that it is closer! The winds are crazy! Why do they have to move so slow? I mean a bad hurricane is like a 24 hour tornado!
they give you a couple days so as to leave!!
crazy wind here in Treasure Island
what beach?
Red Shores
Thank you for explaining the tornado warnings we get on our phones. I was getting very nervous! You are the best
figures, I missed hearing that!
what's the app to download on our phones to get alerts?
it is ABC News storm shield
Thank you Denis Phillips. Debby is a sneaky one!
How come there is no lightening and thunder with this storm unlike our daily afternoon storms
I’m just now seeing lightening here in Brandon
This is a little worse than some afternoon thunderstorms. Those last 15 minutes. We’ve been in one for hours.
Nadine is doing a fantastic job! You are, too, Denis. Ty.
This is looking a little too close (for coastal Pasco County) and it is strengthening because it is going so slow. YIKES!
Tornado watching issued for Spring Hill and Shady Hills
Well we have had plenty of inland rain in Wesley Chapel!
Mike said it isn’t turning quite yet, but the bump east could mean landfall closer to Perry
Definitely not low for us as after Idalia we got hit by a tornado too. First time ever.

Definitely getting more choppy in our area. Not going to say anything to jinx us about, you know what. I've had two TVs on all day. One has an antenna (Inside now) and is staying put on ABC Action News. Wind gusts are pretty fierce now. 🤐🥺🫣😬
Curious what the rainfall totals are so far. It’s soggy here in Wesley Chapel. Kids were just asking if we’d be seeing walking catfish anytime soon.
they climbed out of our storm drains in largo earlier!
I'm stuck at a Publix, in St Pete, there's been no police at intersections that are extremely flooded and there are cars getting stalled left and right

they prepared you all week why ?!what could you possibly need that was so important that it couldn’t wait til tomorrow or when the storm pass ?!!now you want people to feel sorry for you because your stuck at Publix ? 🙄
I had to paint a condominium and only could do it today... If you must know.

your well being and safety is so much more important,,,,, that condo will still be standing next week when this is all over, we need to prioritize ourselves better and put what’s important first, again this has been talked about all week but glad you are safe …. Hope you got home safely.
There are workers still out today. There are no mandatory evacuations. Maybe he works at Publix?
possibly? But he mentioned having to paint a condo. But if that’s the case, that he is working at Publix I’m wrong.
which Publix/what area of St Pete?
66th St and 16th Ave
Glad to hear you are safe. 🙏🙏❤️❤️

Thanks for update.
I’m up north in Nova Scotia …have a trailer in a Bradenton park…worried …thanks again
Strong band in west Pasco just now. Something hit my window.
it’s bad here!
same here
We are going to get rain from Debbie starting tomorrow which may cause flooding glad all is well with you guys hugs and kisses
We are in plant city, I can’t live because my husband is very sick. We live in a RV ,please tell us if we’re alright 😢
you will be ok.
My husband just passed. 🙏🏼🔥😢
I am so very sorry! prayers for you.
thanks😢
I feel it’s been moving east for a little bit now. Ugh.
is your family from UPSTATE NY
yes, we have family from upstate NY.
